---
title: 'Banking Basics for Believers'
date: '1980-01-02T05:21:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'N2 Good Success Resource Center'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1277439481712319253'
blogger_filename: '/1980/01/banking-basics-for-believers.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/N2 Good Success Resource Center/feed.atom'
---

<h3 style="text-align: center;">
Banking Basics For Believers</h3>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: left; margin-right: 1em; text-align: left;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://gumroad.com/l/bankingbasics" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;" target="_blank"><img alt="" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bankingbasicsforbelievers-cover-final-a281a461ec1e.jpg" height="200" width="129" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><br /></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
God takes great pleasure in the prosperity of His servants (Psalms 
35:27). How much more does he care about us, who are called his children
 (Romans 8:16)? We ought to prosper in all things and be in health; even
 as our soul prospers (3 John 1:2) God is looking for a prosperous 
church. It takes money to print bibles and send missionaries and fund 
ministries. We ought to be joyful givers. How can we give when we 
haven't anything to give? Understanding banking should be a basic part 
of education in today's world. But far too many lack the education they 
need to understand financial principles and use the banking system to 
their full advantage. This book is written to help people in the 
skillful use of financial principles and the practical understanding of 
how a bank works. Some of the questions answered are: "What is the 
difference between checking accounts?", "Why do I get overdraft fees?", 
and "Should I borrow money?" These questions and more are answered in 
this book. Enjoy and prosper with the tools you need to set you free 
through the Word of God in banking and financial matters.</blockquote>
</div>
<br />
To get a copy for yourself:<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>
<a href="https://gum.co/bankingbasics">Banking Basics for Believers PDF E-Book</a>&nbsp;</li>
<li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" target="_blank">Available in Paperback and Kindle on Amazon.Com</a></li>
</ul>
Back to: <a href="http://n2goodsuccess.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">Home</a>
